name: Jay Inslee
subject: HUGE WIN: I’m so thrilled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
President Trump's racist ban CAN'T stand. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA0MDI0MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDc4Nzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- I'm proud. I hope you are, too. Today the 9th Circuit Court of Appeals rejected Trump's desperate appeal to reinstate his discriminatory travel ban. The court refused to strike down the temporary halt to the ban. I am proud that Washington was the first state to stand against this executive order and thank Attorney General Bob Ferguson for his leadership. This is a huge victory for Washington state and all Americans. While we will all have to continue to fight together for our future, we are relieved that families across our nation can continue to be reunited. The fight continues, but for today, compassion won. Our Constitution won. And Washington state has won, while Trump was dealt his first major defeat. [**This is a huge victory for all Americans and our future -- share this graphic on Facebook to celebrate the court 's ruling that President Trump's discriminatory ban cannot continue.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA0MDI0MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDc4Nzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA0MDI0MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDc4Nzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0) I am grateful that Washington state and the rest of the nation will continue to legally welcome refugees with open arms. No one should be turned away because of their religion and the xenophobic and extreme views of our president -- it's not what America is built on. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [**SHARE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA0MDI0MzkS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTEwMDc4Nzk0NgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

But you can do something about it, Friend. In the next 24 hours, we need to show President Trump the American people support his commitment to keeping the American People SAFE. Sign your name on the official petition to show YOUR support for this critical national security policy. >> President Trump has called for a temporary restriction on people entering our country from nations compromised by radical Islamic terrorism. It’s a commonsense, constitutional policy to keep our country safe. But ever since President Trump signed it into law, the media has gone to extreme lengths to tear it to shreds and lie about it to the American people. The media doesn’t want you to know that this commonsense policy is supported by a majority of Americans. name: Democrats.org
subject: This makes voting easier. So the GOP eliminated it.
body:
The GOP wants fewer people to vote -- period.
---
**Help Democrats protect the right to vote -- add your name to call on Republicans to fully fund the Election Assistance Commission.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fund-the-EAC1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd")**
Friend --

You might not have heard of it, but I'd bet you've benefitted from the work of the Election Assistance Commission.

The EAC is the federal agency charged with testing and certifying voting machines, helping states improve how elections are run, and getting information out to the public about voting.

And House Republicans voted to destroy it.

**[Add your name right now and call on the GOP to fully fund the Election Assistance Commission.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fund-the-EAC1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+right+now+and+call+on+the+&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd")**

The EAC is a bipartisan commission, and it was created as a direct response to the 2000 presidential election -- when the Supreme Court, not the voters, decided the presidency.

Tuesday's vote to defund the EAC is yet another step by the GOP to undermine our most fundamental right, the right to vote. Whether it's cheering on the Supreme Court's decision to gut the Voting Rights Act, passing draconian voting restrictions and voter ID laws in state legislatures they control, or Trump's outrageous claim that millions of "illegal votes" cost him a popular vote victory, it's clear that Republicans want more chaos and more doubt in our elections.

They're doing it for one reason: they want fewer Americans to vote.

As long as the GOP keeps chipping away at voting rights, we're not going to stand idly by. We will keep fighting to protect the right to vote to make sure that all Americans can make their voices heard.

**If you're with us, then add your name and call on Republicans to restore the EAC and stop trying to restrict the right to vote.**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Fund-the-EAC1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd")**
Our democracy is what makes America great, but it can't work if we don't do everything in our power to safeguard the right to vote. Thanks for taking action.

Pratt

Pratt Wiley
Director of Voter Expansion
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c670/4067b0a/2cf374c8f/7e7af870/2004300713/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c670/4067b0a/2cf374c8f/7e7af871/2004300713/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c670/4067b0a/2cf374c8f/7e7af87e/2004300713/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c670/4067b0a/2cf374c8f/7e7af87f/2004300713/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170210_pw_nd&source=em_20170210_pw_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: President Trump's Weekly Address
body:
Recap of Week 3. |
**Trump Administration This Week:
Making America Safe Again and Getting Americans Back to Work **
This week, President Trump and his Administration made great strides in making America safe and getting Americans back to work.

President Trump signed three anti-crime executive orders, fulfilling his promise to put the safety and security of the American people first.

On Wednesday, Senator Jeff Sessions was sworn in as the next Attorney General. Attorney General Sessions is a world-class legal mind and seasoned prosecutor who brings invaluable experience to the position.

President Trump also announced Intel’s $7 billion pledge to bring 10,000 jobs to America, yet another example of President Trump’s America First economic agenda delivering massive results for the American people.

**To find out more, please follow[President Donald J. Trump](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df9a18cdfc12d728a0522506382328737f067ea558621868e46e3fd20afc931a683fedcc1d8f091c69d00c55d8fe5540fe3284f08767f25d) and [The White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df9a18cdfc12d7287a85a12ff5914d9e84551e8d428fb94095386a308456e5e4c77570628997206733c45e06e0b5a5a93c716083fc6687a7) on Facebook and [watch his weekly address. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df9a18cdfc12d72823103ff063ca3def0a1ac2a3ce685a5ac764c8b62eb6a379a9fd901425f0fd00d2bac9ebba80ce7e05291fec4d43cca6)**

**[To get more involved, be sure to add your name to our Getting Americans Back to Work Petition here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=df9a18cdfc12d7288ab68e62ddb831cdbe5e61bbcf239128c834a84b782d8f9143f571d4baeb88ca09cfd1b8b69316d70fb2987860e75f5e)**

name: Kate Black, EMILY's List
subject: ❗ Tom Price
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c72ab/24c69fd9/f80a51da/18e1a20e/909396602/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all&source=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all")
---

Peter,

Tom Price, Donald Trump's disastrous nominee for secretary of health and human services, was just confirmed in the middle of the night by the GOP-controlled Senate.

_This is bad_. He's so virulently anti-choice that both Planned Parenthood and NARAL gave his voting record a ZERO. Now he'll be our country's top health care official, making decisions that will impact millions.

**[It's going to take more pro-choice Democratic women to fight back against the coming attacks on health care and choice. Donate $3 now to help elect more of them.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c72ab/24c69fd9/f80a51da/18e1a20f/909396602/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170210_email_PriceConfirmed?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Its+going+to+take+more+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all&source=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all")**

Price has long been critical of the Affordable Care Act and is expected to lead its repeal. He's said funding for Planned Parenthood "must be stopped." As a congressman, he cosponsored legislation that threatened to upend _Roe v. Wade_ and make some forms of birth control illegal. As chair of the House Budget Committee, he introduced legislation that would gut Medicare and Medicaid.

Now as the secretary of health and human services he'll oversee major agencies -- including the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services, Centers for Disease Control and Prevention, and the Food and Drug Administration. There's no gentler way to put it: His impact on women and families everywhere could be devastating in the years to come.

It's been EMILY's List candidates leading the charge to stop Trump's radical agenda and protect our health care, but we need more of them (a lot more of them) to fight back against what's coming our way.

**Help elect more pro-choice Democratic women. Make a $3 donation to EMILY's List today:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Price-Confirmation](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c72ab/24c69fd9/f80a51da/18e1a208/909396602/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20170210_email_PriceConfirmed?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgPriceConfirmatio&utm_campaign=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all&source=WQEFE211N_digital_email_20170210_PriceConfirm_n-all")**

Thanks,

Kate Black
Vice President of Research, EMILY's List

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: the fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Every day I feel the weight of the critical work we have before us: defending the principles and rights that are so fundamental to our democracy and pushing back against the reckless Trump/GOP agenda. | __ Friend -

Every day I feel the weight of the critical work we have before us: defending the principles and rights that are so fundamental to our democracy and pushing back against the reckless Trump/GOP agenda.

That's why I am fighting tooth-and-nail. I will not allow this president to undermine our Constitution and the basic values we believe in.

As you may have heard, I was selected to lead the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee (DSCC), which is the organization charged with supporting Democratic senate candidates in the upcoming 2018 elections. I am excited to take on this responsibility, but we face a daunting task: 25 members of our Senate Caucus are up for re-election compared to only 8 Republican senators. Moreover, 10 of our senators running in 2018 represent states that Trump won, while only one of the Republican senators comes from a state that Clinton carried.

**The stakes could not be higher. Trump and GOP power brokers know that Senate Democrats are the last Blue Line of defense standing between them and their reckless agenda to turn back the clock on the progress we have made in America. They would like nothing more than to tear down that Blue Line -- and their vicious attack ads have already begun.**

name: Team Trump-Pence
subject: Week 3: Putting America First
body:
| | [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=1)
---
### [ ](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=2)
---
Peter, On the week of President Ronald Reagan's birthday our new President, Donald Trump, has continued taking bold steps to Make America Great Again! This week there were several clear cut examples of putting America First. President Trump passed executive orders to review financial regulations, met with airline executives to improve infrastructure in their industry, showed his support for our law enforcement across the country, and announced a major investment by Intel that will create thousands of new jobs. The President is showing his clear commitment to improving the lives of all Americans. He understands that in order to Make America Great Again, things need to be improved across the board, not just in one area. Peter, with your support and the support of all Americans, we can do just that! Learn more about the President's week below.
* * *
****THIS WEEK
[](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=3)
****
* * *
**
**
* **Fostering Economic Growth In The United States

** Last Friday, President Trump signed an executive order that established the core principles of financial regulations. These core principles will empower Americans to make independent financial decisions and informed choices in the marketplace, save for retirement, and build individual wealth. He has also directed the Treasury Secretary to file a report within 120 days on possible regulatory changes or legislative recommendations. President Trump is committed to making regulations efficient, effective and appropriately tailored, as well as restoring public accountability with federal financial regulatory agencies.

* **Putting Americans Back To Work

** President Trump is using the power of the presidency to ensure that actions are taken to rebuild the nation, renegotiate U.S. trade deals, and most importantly take action to ensure U.S. job creation. So far he has withdrawn the United States from the TPP trade deal, re-opened the door to build the Keystone and Dakota Access pipelines, instructed government agencies to reduce regulations in order to speed up their ability to work, and has met with leaders across several industries to talk about putting America First and getting Americans back to work. On Wednesday, he met with the CEO of Intel, Brian Krzanich, who announced a **$7 BILLION DOLLAR INVESTMENT AND 10,000 NEW JOBS** in their most advanced factory in Chandler, Arizona! Hear more about this great achievement from the Intel CEO himself - [WATCH](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fofficialteamtrump%2Fposts%2F1853762611579954&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=4).

* **Confirming The President's Appointments

** Despite efforts by Democrats to delay and block the President from assembling his team to keep Making America Great Again, there are three new Cabinet members officially on board that are already hard at work for the American people. Betsy DeVos is now the Secretary of Education, Rex Tillerson is the Secretary of State, and on Wednesday night Senator Jeff Sessions was confirmed as the new Attorney General. A big congratulations is in order for these great picks to aide in Donald Trump's mission - and we can't wait to see what they do!

* **Improving Infrastructure Across The Board

** We need to improve our airports, trains, planes, roads, and bridges. President Trump met with airline executives yesterday to discuss rolling back burdensome regulations, lowering overall tax burdens on businesses, and developing aviation infrastructure.

* **Supporting Our Law Enforcement And Strengthening Our Communities
**
This week, President Trump was honored to welcome the National Sheriffs' Association, thanking them for their efforts and outstanding work. He also let them know that his job is to help them do their job on the thin blue line. Stopping the opioid epidemic, strengthening the bonds between the communities and the police, and being tough on crime were all topics discussed by the President. Proving that it wasn't just talk, President Trump issued three new executive orders geared toward crime and public safety. Showing that he is clearly dedicated to Making America **Safe** Again!

* * *
In just three weeks, the President has wasted no time in getting our country back on track. As his cabinet continues to form we can rest assured that our government will continue to improve and they can start doing what they were originally intended to do - **WORK FOR THE AMERICAN PEOPLE!** We're in this together and we can't thank you enough for your continued support. **Team Trump-Pence** [**P.S.** NEW ITEMS were added to the "Last Chance" section of our store, check it out before we are completely out - click here to go to the store](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=5)! [](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fshop.donaldjtrump.com%2Fcollections%2Flast-chance&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=in2102&n=6)
